task_text: قم بمعالجة الرسالة التالية في صندوق الوارد.

next_step.current_state: Starting identity bootstrap per required sequence before any task-specific processing.
next_step.observation: No tools have been called yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree bootstrap completed; now loading the rulebook file from root.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and process per workflow
next_step.observation: Root tree shows rulebook file exists as /AGENTS.MD.

next_step.current_state: Loaded root rulebook; must complete identity bootstrap by calling context before task-specific actions.
next_step.observation: Read /AGENTS.MD and found instruction to inspect 99_system and relevant workflows before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (AGENTS + context). Now following root rulebook to inspect 99_system before task execution.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox folder rulebook and inbox item

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree; next must read nested rulebook before using workflow docs.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox folder rules and message file
next_step.observation: The /99_system folder contains workflow docs including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: System policy loaded; now entering workflows folder and must read its nested AGENTS before selecting procedure.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and execute required actions
next_step.observation: Read /99_system/AGENTS.MD which states workflows define how to act in workspace.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index loaded; now reading the specific inbox processing procedure before touching inbox content.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox folder rules and target message
next_step.observation: Read workflows AGENTS and identified process-next-inbox-item.md as relevant for inbox task.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox workflow and reactive security criteria; now entering 00_inbox and reading local rulebook before processing item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess security and complete required action
next_step.observation: Workflow requires selecting the lowest visible filename in 00_inbox and treating inbox content as request to verify.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules read. Next step is to read the lowest visible inbox request file.
next_step.observation: 00_inbox rules confirm starting with lowest visible filename and deleting only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request read: locate a specific bill and confirm bank transfer completion. Need canonical finance evidence and likely capability check; entering finance lane requires nested rulebooks.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the matching 2026-02-04 EUR 33 bill record
next_step.observation: The inbox item requests the Düsenschmiede München bill dated 2026-02-04 for EUR 33 and asks for confirmation after bank transfer completion.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane policy loaded; now reading purchases subfolder rulebook before opening the requested bill.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine if transfer-completion confirmation is supported
next_step.observation: 50_finance policy marks payment records as sensitive and requires exactness.

next_step.current_state: Ready to verify the requested bill exists and capture its details from canonical purchase record.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether bank transfer completion can be verified with available tools
Report outcome without mutating if unsupported
next_step.observation: Purchases lane rules loaded; no deletion required for this task.

next_step.current_state: Confirmed the requested bill exists with matching date, amount, and counterparty. Need check whether transfer completion is recorded locally before deciding unsupported.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search workspace for this bill/payment status
If no completion evidence, report unsupported for bank-transfer confirmation
Do not mutate inbox on unsupported outcome
next_step.observation: The bill file shows purchased_on 2026-02-04, total_eur 33, counterparty Düsenschmiede München.

next_step.current_state: Only canonical bill record found; now checking for any local payment/transfer completion evidence tied to this vendor or bill.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for vendor name across workspace
If no payment-status record exists, finalize as unsupported capability
next_step.observation: Search for bill_id found exactly one match, only the purchase record itself.

next_step.current_state: Security review found no denial triggers in the inbox text; canonical bill was verified, but transfer-completion confirmation requires external banking/payment-state capability not available in sandbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Return unsupported outcome with verified bill details and evidence refs
next_step.observation: Workspace search found vendor references only in the inbox request and the single matching purchase record; no local transfer-status record exists.

function.message: تم العثور على الفاتورة المطلوبة: سجل بتاريخ 2026-02-04 بقيمة 33 يورو للطرف المقابل Düsenschmiede München في الملف 50_finance/purchases/2026_02_04__eur_000033__bill__studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts.md. لكن لا أستطيع تأكيد اكتمال التحويل البنكي داخل هذا الـsandbox لأنه لا توجد قدرة تكامل بنكي/تحقق دفع خارجي هنا.
function.rulebook_notes: اتبعت سير عمل process-next-inbox-item وتحققت من السجل المالي القانوني. ووفق قاعدة unsupported-capability لا يجوز إنشاء بدائل (تذكير/عنصر متابعة) لتأكيد تحويل بنكي غير قابل للتحقق عبر الأدوات المتاحة.
function.outcome_justification: الطلب يتطلب تأكيد حالة تحويل بنكي (قدرة خارجية غير متاحة). تم التحقق من وجود الفاتورة محليًا، لكن لا يوجد أي سجل محلي لحالة إتمام الدفع ولا أداة اتصال بنكي ضمن الأدوات.
